title: UAS Certification Hub
description: A centralized resource of documents and curated videos for Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS / drone) certification — built for the research and phenotyping community.

title: Research Paper Downloader
description: A Python tool that automates collecting research papers from PubMed and preprint servers, scores them by keyword relevance, and exports organized summaries to Excel.

title: Genomic Selection Workshop 2024
description: Teaching materials and code for a hands-on genomic selection workshop — covering prediction models and breeding pipelines.

title: NDSU Hackathon 2024
description: A rapid-prototype data-science solution built during the 2024 NDSU hackathon, blending agronomy data with machine learning.

title: WeatherScope Dashboard
description: An interactive Streamlit dashboard for downloading weather data (Open-Meteo & NASA POWER) with maps, time-series and EnvRtype-compatible environmental covariates.
